session_id: operator-dispatched (gov-loop); Packet 3 started, reframed to inventory-first
class: Operator-directed research specimen. Phase 1 = read-only inventory + source typing (doc) + the first specimen's PURE verdict core (offline). No access enabled, no network, no SSH, no mutation, no scheduler, no Lane B.
slice: Packet 3 / Phase 1 — pfSense reachable-drift: inventory + source typing, and the lease-vs-presence pure verdict core (nq.probe.lease_presence.v1).
preceded_by: Packets 1-2 committed + loop reconciled (289d77f). Operator said start pfSense, then reframed: use pfSense hard, source-type everything, inventory before probes.

what_executed.inventory_doc: docs/working/decisions/PFSENSE_REACHABLE_DRIFT_STEP0_INVENTORY.md (new): trees out pfSense 2.8.1 read surfaces (interfaces/gateways/routes/firewall rules/NAT/aliases/DHCP leases/ARP/NDP/DNS/VPN/logs/services/packages/host resources) x read method x testimony type (pfSenseDeclaration / pfSenseRuntimeReport / pfSenseHistoricalReport / ObservedReachability / CannotTestify). Grounds in the operator-pasted dashboard (pfsense.example.internal 10.0.0.1, 2.8.1-RELEASE) typed as a RuntimeReport, not independently witnessed. Sketches the declared reachability graph and names 3 candidate drift checks.
what_executed.lease_presence_core: crates/nq-monitor/src/lease_presence_probe.rs (new): pure clock-injected verdict core comparing a pfSense DHCP lease report against presence observations (ARP residue = pfSenseRuntimeReport; ICMP/TCP probe from a named vantage = ObservedReachability). Non-lift ladder: lease_corroborated_by_presence / lease_uncorroborated / cannot_testify_no_presence_basis / lease_expired_or_absent. Receipt-only, typed verdict, no is_ok/healthy/green coercion. Perturbation distinguishes passive ARP read from active probe. The refusals (lease != presence; uncorroborated != host-down/host-gone/lease-wrong) are the product, carried in non_claims.

operator_decisions_captured.read_path: SSH + pfctl first (key-only, LAN/VPN-only source restriction, no WAN mgmt, read-only commands: pfctl -sr/-sn/-ss, netstat -rn, arp -an, lease/log reads). SNMP queued as a later RuntimeReport channel; REST (unofficial) deprioritized.
operator_decisions_captured.first_check: lease-vs-presence, explicitly as a cheap NON-LIFT specimen. Output must say what it can/cannot testify; forbids host-absent/host-down unless a declared probe regime supports the narrower claim.

evidence_verdict: PASS (offline). cargo test -p nq-monitor --lib lease_presence = 11 passed, 0 failed, LP_EXIT=0 (corroborated via ARP / via probe; uncorroborated; cannot-testify-no-basis; expired; static; mixed; probe_time=clock; passive-vs-active perturbation; refusals + no-coercion; testimony-type travels). lib compiles.
standing_verdict: PASS. Bounded: 1 new doc + 1 new module + 1 lib line + loop bookkeeping + this receipt. No network, no SSH, no mutation, no CLI wired, no scheduler, no Lane B, no authority promotion.
fences_honored: pfSense access NOT enabled and NOT required for this phase. No nq-monitor on pfSense. No config mutation/rule edits/service restarts. No REST dependency. pfSense reports typed as reports, never reachability truth; NQ probes typed as vantage-local, never global truth. The verdict core refuses host-down from lease+silence.

gated_next_slice.name: lease-presence LIVE read (Phase 2)
gated_next_slice.gate: operator enables read-only SSH on pfsense.example.internal (10.0.0.1) key-only + LAN/VPN-only, and names a probe vantage host.
gated_next_slice.scope: detect ISC dhcpd.leases vs Kea lease store (pfSense 2.8.x may use Kea); read leases + arp -an over SSH from an independent box; optional ICMP/TCP presence probe from the named vantage; fill lease_presence_probe inputs and emit receipts. Read-only; perturbation accounted.
gated_next_slice.not_in_scope: no mutation; no scheduler; no dashboard authority; no enforcement probe (that is check #1, the gold finding, a separate packet needing a guest-VLAN vantage).

commit_state: Working tree, NOT committed (operator owns the commit/push signal). Files: PFSENSE_REACHABLE_DRIFT_STEP0_INVENTORY.md (new), lease_presence_probe.rs (new), lib.rs (+1), .governor/loop.json, this receipt.
loop_state: REVIEW — verified green offline, awaiting operator commit decision + access enablement for the live slice.
